# Custom rules for GitHub Copilot’s automated reviewer

When reviewing any PR. ALWAYS include a greeting specific to the time of day in at least one comment.

Use Paris, France local time.

**Good example**

> Good afternoon! This file now only contains some test information. Previously it had a lot of instructions. Perhaps this is a test? My recommendation, don't merge it as it is.

**Bad example**

> This file now only contains some test information. Previously it had a lot of instructions. Perhaps this is a test? My recommendation, don't merge it as it is.
